# SeenBy — Email Templates

> All emails sent from `contact@seenby.my`  
> Personalise the [BRACKETED] fields before sending. Never send a template cold.

---

## 1. Welcome Email (Post-Onboarding)

**Trigger:** After baseline scan is complete, toolkit files generated (if applicable), and client is fully set up.  
**Timing:** Send within 24h of completing onboarding.

---

**Subject:** You're live on SeenBy — here's your baseline

Hi [First Name],

Welcome aboard — your SeenBy account is set up and your first scan is done.

**Your baseline AI Visibility Score: [X]/100**

This is your starting point. It tells us how often AI platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude are seeing [Brand Name] when people ask about [their category] in [their market].

Here's what we found in your first scan:

- **[Platform 1]:** [1-line finding — e.g., "Not seen by AI for recommendation queries"]
- **[Platform 2]:** [1-line finding]
- **Biggest gap:** [1 sentence — e.g., "Competitor X is recommended 3x more often than you for 'best X in KL'"]

[If Growth/Authority — include toolkit section:]

**Your AI Readiness Toolkit is attached:**
- `llms.txt` — tells AI crawlers who you are and what you do
- `schema.json` — structured data for AI and search engines
- `robots.txt` — opens access to AI bots like GPTBot and PerplexityBot

Implementation instructions are included in each file. Your web developer can upload these to your site root in under 30 minutes. Implementing these is the single fastest way to improve your score.

**What happens next:**
- Weekly digests land in this inbox every [day] with notable changes
- Your first monthly report arrives on [date]
- If your score drops or a competitor overtakes you, I'll reach out immediately

Any questions, just reply here.

Irfan Faris  
Founder, SeenBy  
contact@seenby.my

---

## 2. Monthly Report Delivery Email

**Trigger:** Monthly PDF report reviewed and approved by Faris.  
**Timing:** 30 days after signup, then every 30 days.

---

**Subject:** Your AI Visibility Report — [Month YYYY] · Score: [X]/100

Hi [First Name],

Your [Month] AI visibility report is ready.

**This month's score: [X]/100** *(last month: [X] — [up/down/flat] [Δ] points)*

[Pick one depending on movement:]

*If score improved:*  
Good progress this month — [1 specific reason why, e.g., "your Gemini citability jumped after the toolkit implementation"]. Here's the full picture.

*If score dropped:*  
Your score dipped this month — [1 specific reason, e.g., "Perplexity updated how it handles local queries and fewer Malaysia-based brands are being cited"]. I've flagged the key action to address it below.

*If score flat:*  
Your score held steady this month. [1 insight — e.g., "Competitor X gained ground on recommendation queries — worth watching"].

**Top 3 things to know this month:**
1. [Key finding — e.g., "ChatGPT is now recommending you for 'best clinic in PJ' — up from 0 last month"]
2. [Key finding — e.g., "Competitor X overtook you on Perplexity for comparison queries"]
3. [Key finding — e.g., "Your Brand Authority score improved after your recent press coverage"]

**Recommended action this month:**  
[1 specific, actionable recommendation — e.g., "Add a FAQ section to your homepage covering 'What makes [Brand] different from [Competitor]?' — this is the exact query AI is currently answering without citing you."]

[Attach PDF or link: "📎 Full report attached / View your report: [R2 link]"]

[If they have a client view link:]  
You can also check your live dashboard anytime: [share link]

Irfan Faris  
Founder, SeenBy  
contact@seenby.my

---

## 3. Score Alert Email (to Client)

**Trigger:** Automated alert fires (score drop ≥5pts or competitor overtake).  
**Timing:** Same day as alert. Personalise and send within 24h.

---

**Subject:** Heads up — your AI visibility changed this week

Hi [First Name],

Quick update — our monitoring picked up a notable change for [Brand Name].

**What happened:** [1–2 sentences — e.g., "Your competitor [Competitor X] is now being recommended ahead of you on ChatGPT for 'best [category] in KL'. This shift happened in the last 7 days."]

**What it means:** [Brief context — e.g., "This affects your recommendation query score. It doesn't impact your brand query or comparison query performance."]

**What I'd suggest:** [1 specific action — e.g., "Publishing a comparison page — '[Brand] vs [Competitor]' — gives AI a clear, citable source when it handles this query type. I can include this in your content roadmap."]

I'll cover this in full in your monthly report, but wanted to flag it now so you're in the loop.

Any questions, just reply.

Irfan  
contact@seenby.my

---

## 4. Hallucination Alert Email (to Client)

**Trigger:** AI platform is spreading incorrect information about the client's brand.  
**Timing:** Same day. This is urgent — treat it as priority.

---

**Subject:** Important — AI is saying something incorrect about [Brand Name]

Hi [First Name],

I need to flag something from this month's scan.

**What we found:** [Platform — e.g., ChatGPT] is describing [Brand Name] as [incorrect claim — e.g., "a Subang-based clinic" when you're in Bangsar]. This appears across [X] queries.

This is called an AI hallucination — the model is generating inaccurate information about your brand. It can affect how potential customers perceive you.

**What we're doing:** I've logged this in your activity record and it will be tracked in future scans to see if it persists or spreads to other platforms.

**What you can do now:**
1. Ensure your website clearly states the correct information ([specific fix — e.g., your location and founding year on the About page and in your schema markup])
2. If you have an existing Google Business Profile, verify it's accurate — AI platforms pull from public sources
3. [If toolkit not yet implemented:] Implementing your `llms.txt` and `schema.json` files gives AI a direct, authoritative source to pull from

I'll flag if this clears in the next scan.

Irfan  
contact@seenby.my

---

## 5. Invoice / Payment Reminder Email

**Trigger:** Invoice unpaid after 7 days.

---

**Subject:** Reminder: Invoice #[XXX] due — SeenBy

Hi [First Name],

Just a quick reminder that Invoice #[XXX] for RM [amount] was due on [date].

If you've already sent payment, please ignore this — it may just be processing.

If not, you can transfer to:  
[Bank name] · Account: [account number] · Reference: INV-[XXX]

Let me know if you have any questions.

Irfan  
contact@seenby.my

## 6. Renewal / End-of-Minimum-Term Email

**Trigger:** Client approaching end of 3-month minimum term.  
**Timing:** Send 2 weeks before minimum term ends.

---

**Subject:** Your SeenBy results so far + what's next

Hi [First Name],

It's been 3 months — a good moment to reflect on what's moved.

**[Brand Name] AI Visibility Journey:**

| | Month 1 (Baseline) | Month 3 (Now) | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| AI Visibility Score | [X] | [X] | [+/- X] |
| Platforms Seen By | [X]/4 | [X]/4 | |
| Biggest win | — | [1-liner] | |

[1–2 sentences on the narrative — e.g., "You went from invisible on Perplexity to being recommended for 3 of your 5 target queries. Your competitor gap on ChatGPT narrowed from 4x to 2x."]

**What I'd recommend for the next phase:** [Specific — e.g., "Now that the toolkit is implemented and your baseline is solid, the highest-leverage move is the content roadmap — we can systematically close the competitor gap on recommendation queries."]

Your subscription continues on a month-to-month basis from [date]. If you'd like to upgrade, adjust scope, or discuss anything, let's get 20 minutes on a call — [Calendly link].

And if you'd like to lock in 12 months at a [17%] discount, just say the word.

Irfan
